== Notes for [[Item:Q100751|Q100751]] ==

[http://www.pbs.org/wnet/heritage/episode4/presentations/4.6.1-1.html '''De La Cavalleria Family Tree''' - audio]
--------------------
Fuente: http://www.bisabuelos.com

Se convirtió al cristianismo en 1402

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
67051AD82EAFA1EFBBFA9822EF79916C9F1A
geni:6000000001500854376

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
